form.batch_hint: Editing any field updates only that field for all selected files.
form.title: Title
validation.year: Enter a four-digit year from 1000 to 9999.
inspector.title: Metadata & Cover Art
cover.mixed_hint: Multiple cover images: choose an image to replace them all, or remove all covers
cover.external_hint: Cover image in memory; not yet written to the audio file
cover.embedded_hint: Embedded cover image in file (read-only preview)
cover.removed_hint: Cover image removed from the current in-memory draft
cover.unavailable_hint: Drop an image onto the cover or choose an image
app.close.title: Save changes?
app.close.body: There are unsaved tag or cover image changes.
app.select_file: Select an audio file from the left.
app.open_folder: Open a music folder from the top toolbar first.
app.initial_status: Choose a music folder to start browsing.
tooltip.toggle_inspector: Show or hide metadata and cover art
tooltip.batch_unsaved: Batch edits have not been saved
app.saving_before_switch: Saving tags; wait before switching folders.
app.batch_unsaved: Batch edits have not been saved. Click Save first.
app.saving_before_select: Saving tags; wait before selecting another file.
app.undo_while_saving: Undo and redo are unavailable until saving finishes.
app.history_mismatch: The current selection does not match the latest batch history.
app.saving_before_close: Saving tags; the window can close when it finishes.
app.scan_complete: Folder scan complete. Select an audio file to edit its in-memory draft.
app.no_supported_audio: No supported audio files were found in this folder or its subfolders.

error.cover_format: Cover format must be JPEG, PNG, GIF, BMP, or TIFF.
